---
id: create-chat
title: "Create chat"
description: "Creates a new chat object in the specified space. This is a convenience endpoint that hides the internal `chat_derived` type key."
sidebar_label: "Create chat"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/2025-11-08/anytype-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create chat"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/spaces/{space_id}/chats"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new chat object in the specified space. This is a convenience endpoint that hides the internal `chat_derived` type key.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
